title: Hatchan Pushes Harder
description: On pages 8–11, hatchan pushes harder focuses on Zoro, Hatchan, Usopp, Nami as zoro’s injuries worsen during the fight, but he continues battling Hatchan while the others struggle around him.
scene: On pages 8–11, hatchan pushes harder focuses on Zoro, Hatchan, Usopp, Nami as zoro’s injuries worsen during the fight, but he continues battling Hatchan while the others struggle around him.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: The weight? You mean to say your swords are heavier than mine!? Don't be stupid!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: You may not realize it just by looking at them, but each of my swords weighs 300kg!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: They're far heavier than any swords that you puny humans use!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Hmph, I have nothing to say to an idiot like you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh no! He took a full hit to his wounds!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I won't give you a safe landing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Touch it and you'll be Mincemeat!

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
